title: This Bullish Bitcoin Pattern Hasn’t Happened in 4 Years
transcript: Despite  the  rumblings  of  war  in  Iran,   crypto  has  just  flipped  bullish  with   Bitcoin  reclaiming  74,000  and  all  coins   in  key  sectors  ripping  over  100%.  This   is  the  first  mega  bullish  update  that   I've  been  able  to  bring  you  in  months.   And  remember,  I  told  you  we  were  going   to  be  locking  in  and  creating  an   objective,  utterly  truth  seeking  system   for  how  we  approach  markets.  and  one  of   my  key  alarm  bells  has  just  fired  to   reverse  my  downtrend  bias  and  to  start   taking  longs,  which  is  exactly  what  I've   done.  We  also  have  a  wild  update  from   Michael  Sailor's  strategy,  which  for  the   first  time  in  a  while  feels  like  it  may   be  tipping  the  tides  and  bringing  crypto   back  into  a  bullish  posturing.  Now,  if   you  can,  please  smash  that  like  button.   It's  a  simple  and  easy  thing  to  do.  And   in  these  bearish  times,  it's  really   important  that  we  get  these  videos  out   there  and  keep  circulating  crypto  news   throughout  the  internet.  As  always,  if   you're  not  subscribed,  I  encourage  you   to  hit  that  sub  button  and  put  that  bell   notification  on  so  you  can  get  updates   like  this  in  a  timesensitive  manner  as   the  markets  are  not  going  to  wait  for   anyone.  And  when  they  move  in  times  like   this,  they  can  move  at  light  speed.  Now,   first  and  foremost,  let  us  observe   Bitcoin  not  only  having  finally   reclaimed  this  chunky  72k  area.  As  you   can  see,  it  had  one  failed  attempt,  two   failed  attempts,  and  then  finally  on   lucky  number  three,  we  got  our  72K   reclaim  level  back  in  action.  So  that   means  that  we  now  have  to  get  over  74,   which  we  did.  If  you  remember,  this   $745,000   level  goes  all  the  way  back  to  Trump's   tariff  liberation  day  low.  This  was  the   ultimate  low  of  the  freak  out  in  April   of  2025,  right  after  Trump  took  office.   his  first  historic  taco,  the  Trump   always  chickens  out  trade.  And  now  you   can  see  we  finally  reclaimed  it  and  are   now  building  structure  above  this  74k   region,  which  means  that  we  now  have  a   chance  to  see  Bitcoin  get  back  and  start   building  some  price  action  in  these   $70,000  territory.  Now,  it's  important   to  realize  that  these  70,000s  have  moved   really  fast  in  the  past  over  this  72  to   74k  range.  We've  gapped  all  the  way  up   to  the  90s  the  first  time  and  then  we   had  another  pretty  extreme  move  up  the   second  time  we  did  it.  As  you  can  see,   we  came  down  really  fast  through  this   area  last  time.  And  that  means  that   things  can  tend  to  move  quickly  when   there's  not  a  lot  of  price  levels  to   bounce  off  of.  So,  what  does  that  mean   for  you?  What  it  means  is  that  I  am   currently  long  Bitcoin  and  Ethereum  as   well  as  excited  about  some  altcoins.  But   what  I'll  say  is  that  the  real   asymmetric  play  is  hoping  to  see  Bitcoin   get  back  up  above  this  $80,000  level  up   into  the  80s.  That  is  the  current  moment   we're  looking  to  see  happen.  If  we  fail   somewhere  in  the  70s,  that  is  really   bad.  And  of  course,  that  would  mean  that   we're  probably  going  to  flip  over  and   start  seeing  some  lows.  But  if  we're   able  to  successfully  reclaim  80  and  move   higher,  that  would  mean  that  we  are   going  to  look  at  a  potential  full-scale   market  reversal.  Again,  without  getting   too  speculative,  we've  seen  some  serious   lows,  some  serious  extreme  sell-offs  in   this  bare  market,  and  now  it's  time  for   a  reverse  trend  rally.  Whether  that   reverse  trend  rally  turns  into  something   like  an  entirely  new  bull  market,  we   certainly  hope  it  will.  But  I  will  say   if  the  four-year  cycle  that  has  played   out  almost  to  the  very  picos  second  over   the  last  16  years  continues  to  play  out,   that  would  mean  that  we  wouldn't  find   our  lows  until  later  in  the  year.  But   for  now,  let's  just  enjoy  this  pump   because  there  is  quite  a  bit  of   interesting  stuff  going  on  here.  First   and  foremost,  let  me  present  to  you   Stretch  because  this  is  a  new  thing  that   Michael  Sailor  and  his  team  over  at   Micro  Strategy  have  started  to  use  to   buy  billions  of  dollars  of  Bitcoin   almost  every  single  week.  Now,  I  had  AI   summarize  this,  but  effectively  Stretch   is  a  yield  token.  You  can  think  of  this   like  you're  buying  a  fixed  yield.  You   put  a  million  dollars  in,  its  value   doesn't  change  or  it's  designed  to  be   stable  and  you  get  10%  back  each  and   every  year.  So  almost  three  times  what   you  get  for  buying  a  government  bond  you   can  get  for  depositing  into  a  riskier   yield  instrument  that  is  STRC  which  is   part  of  Micro  Strategies  company.  Now   what  is  STRC?  Effectively  the  way  it   works  is  that  investors  buy  STRC  which   is  supposed  to  be  stable  at  100  bucks.   So  the  actual  value  of  the  thing  you  buy   isn't  supposed  to  fluctuate  much.  And   the  way  they  do  this  is  if  the  price   goes  up,  they  lower  the  yield  to   encourage  people  to  sell  it  down  until   it  reaches  that  $100  equilibrium.  And  if   it  goes  below  that  equilibrium,  they   increase  the  yield  that  you're  going  to   get  so  it  brings  it  back  up.  It  uses  a   very  similar  premise  to  an  algo  stable   that  we've  seen  with  things  like  Terral   Luna.  Again,  it's  a  bad  comparison  to   make  because  we  all  know  Ter  Luna  did   not  end  well.  However,  it's  important   you  realize  that  this  is  this  kind  of   money  glitch  thing  that  they  figured   out,  which  very  smart  and  intelligent   people  disagree  with  each  other  as  to   whether  or  not  it's  sustainable.  Worth   noting  that  if  Bitcoin  crashes   significantly,  at  some  point  this  STRC   thing  will  stop  working.  So,  it's   important  you  realize  this  is  not  free   money.  This  is  a  high-risk  yield   instrument.  Okay?  With  that  in  mind,   effectively  what  they're  doing  is   they're  using  this  Bitcoin  dividend  to   fund  new  buys  of  Bitcoin.  They're  giving   people  a  10%  yield  and  then  they're   going  to  use  the  money  that's  raised  to   buy  more  Bitcoin  which  effectively  props   up  Bitcoin  and  the  underlying  value  of   the  collateral  which  allows  them  to  sell   more  STRC.  So  this  is  actually  pretty   crazy  and  the  amount  of  STRC  sold   according  to  Grock  here  is  over  $5   billion  already  which  is  an  insane   amount  and  explains  how  they've  been   able  to  yolo  like  no  other  into  Bitcoin   as  of  recent.  And  so  maybe  some  of  this   recent  price  resilience  by  Bitcoin  has   actually  been  the  STRC  buys  that  Michael   Sailor  has  managed  to  engineer  to  create   a  new  buying  mechanism  for  Bitcoin   itself.  And  if  that  is  to  perpetuate  and   continue,  maybe  this  gets  much  much   higher.  Maybe  we're  able  to  see  Bitcoin   mount  a  fullscale  structural  comeback.   But  for  now,  it's  important  you  realize   that  this  stretch  thing  is  significant.   It's  a  new  thing,  a  new  mechanism  that   is  being  used  to  fund  Bitcoin  buying.   And  at  a  time  when  people  are  not  really   buying  Bitcoin,  it  is  a  massive  massive   change  to  the  buyer  seller  dynamic  in   2026.  And  of  course,  if  Bitcoin  does  go   up  significantly  in  value,  that  creates   way  more  capital,  way  more  leverage  for   them  to  go  out  and  sell  this  10%   dividend  coupon.  It's  a  very  interesting   dynamic  and  at  the  very  least,  it's   worth  your  attention.  We'll  be  doing  a   deep  dive  into  stretch  later  on  in   another  episode  as  this  is  a  viable   yield  mechanism  if  you're  willing  to   accept  the  risk  that  Bitcoin  can  go  down   a  lot  and  if  it  does  go  down  over  a   certain  amount  you  will  probably  lose   capital.  So  that's  worth  understanding.   But  certainly  billions  of  dollars  are   saying  hey  10%  is  worth  that  risk  to  me.   Bitcoin  versus  gold  has  finally  snapped   its  days  without  a  new  30-day  high  trend   versus  gold  for  the  longest  running   streak  since  I  guess  I  guess  ever  in   Bitcoin's  history.  As  you  can  see  here,   the  first  rule  of  an  uptrend  is  that  the   downtrend  has  to  end  first.  Now,  what  I   will  say  is  from  a  sentiment   perspective,  there's  been  no  more   destructive  period  in  history  in  crypto   than  what  we've  seen  over  the  last  6   months,  but  really  over  the  last  18   months  or  so  since  the  Trump   inauguration  when  everything  just   plummeted.  Everyone  was  expecting,  you   know,  glorious  alt  season,  myself   included,  we've  seen  the  crypto   community  eviscerated  and  maybe  some   beatings  we  deserved,  others  we  did  not.   Regardless,  we  took  them  all  anyway.  And   it's  almost  reached  a  point  where  I   think  a  lot  of  people  can't  believe  that   the  market  would  even  go  up.  they've   reached  disbelief,  which  is  usually  the   first  part  of  a  market  cycle.  Now,  I'm   not  saying  that  we  are  in  the  midst  of   experiencing  a  full-scale  reversal,  but   it's  worth  noting  that  this  is  how  they   start.  They  start  with  a  lot  of  people   saying,  "I  don't  know  about  this  one.  I   got  beat  up  on  the  last  five.  I  don't   know,  Jimmy.  I'm  not  jumping  in  those   crocodile  infested  waters.  Not  me.  Not   me,  no  sir."  Some  brave  soul  takes  the   first  shot  and  buys.  And  that's  how  we   get  the  uptrend.  That's  how  the   downtrend  stop.  And  that's  how  the   beginning  of  the  magic  happens.  So,   maybe,  just  maybe,  this  is  the  beginning   of  something  great.  Once  again,  I  will   be  giving  you  my  full-scale  trading  plan   here  over  the  coming  days  and  weeks,  but   it's  not  even  worth  discussing,  right?   As  long  as  Bitcoin  is  over  74  and a  half   thousand,  there's  nothing  to  talk  about   as  far  as  weakness.  This  is  now  a  bet  on   strength,  which  is  why  I'm  now  long.  And   I'm  looking  to  see  us  at  least  get  into   the  80,000s  here  for  this  current  trade   before  we  re-evaluate.  Now,  again,  I   will  say  it  would  not  surprise  me  to  see   us  get  over  this  $80,000  territory.  Let   me  go  ahead  and  draw  a  line  right  here.   It  would  not  surprise  us  to  see  us  make   it  up  here,  to  see  a  bunch  of  people  get   really  bullish,  say,  "Oh  my  god,  we  are   so  back  and  then  to  see  the  market,  you   know,  do  one  of  these  and  start  to  roll   over."  That's  totally  possible.  And  then   that  would  be  eventually  what  I  would   imagine  would  lead  to  the  ultimate  bare   market  lows  if  this  happened.  That's  not   what's  happening  right  now.  So,  let's   just  focus  on  what's  happening  right   now,  which  is  we're  finally  over  the  big   boss  of  74K.  We  can  expect  some  upside   as  long  as  we  hold  it.  Now  speaking  of   upside,  the  obvious  winners  right  now   are  Bit  Tensor,  Tao,  FET,  Render. And  it's  also  worth  noting   that  cycle  top  buyers  are  yet  to   capitulate  their  coins.  Usually,   capitulation  of  the  people  who  buy  near   the  highs  is  utterly  critical  to  mark   the  lows.  You  can  see  in  the  blue  here   that  there  was  massive  capitulation  of   people  who  bought  near  the  highs  both  in   2018  as  well  as  in  2022.  We  have  not   seen  that  yet.  We  saw  some  capitulation   here  on  the  way  down  to  60k,  but  we   haven't  seen  people  cut  and  run  for  the   hills.  Not  in  the  same  way. This  might  just  be  setting  yet   another  structural  swing  failure   pattern,  which  is  what  has  caused  the   collapse  in  Bitcoin  all  too  many  times   before. The  more  uncertainty  and  volatility   there  is  in  the  world,  the  more  a  24/7   open  trading  venue  like  Hyperlid  is  for   actually  establishing  price  discovery.   Because  when  the  traditional  markets   shut  at,  you  know,  weekend  hours  or   during  the  night  times,  Hyperlid  is  open   creating  price  discovery  for  things  like   oil  and  gold  so  that  when  the  markets   reopen,  we  actually  know  where  price  has   moved  to.  We  don't  have  to  guess  on  open   whether  we're  going  to  pump  or  dump.   Hyperlid  is  that  canary  in  the  coal   mine.  So,  this  has  become  a  genuine   useful  financial  tool  that  extends  way   beyond  what  it's  being  looked  at  as  just   a  crypto  casino.  We're  also  seeing  the   go  live  of  the  new  ETH  staking  ETF,   which  many  believe  will  bring  an   entirely  new  level  of  interest  and   investment  in  Ethereum  as  a  staking  and   yield  providing  asset  in  addition  to  the   underlying.  This  is  the  crypto  dividend   play  and  we're  seeing  it  play  out  now.   It's  very  interesting  to  see  if  this   will  actually  start  attracting  an  order   of  magnitude  higher  institutional   investment.  This  is  very  interesting.   Now,  the  final  thing  that  we  should  be   aware  of  is  within  the  AI  space,  there   is  one  giant,  and  that  is  Tao,  which  of   course  has  many  subnets  below  it.  We're   not  going  to  do  a  full  deep  dive  on  Tao,   but  it's  worth  noting  that  there  are   some  subnets  that  you  can  stake  Tao  and   earn  these  subnets  that  are  actually   becoming  genuinely  useful  within  the  AI   space.  So  something  like  Templar  here,   which  is  a  bet  on  decentralized  LLM   training,  is  relatively  cheap  when  you   compare  a  $60  million  FTV  to  the   hundreds  of  billions  of  dollars  for   these  frontier  labs.  Again,  I  think  it's   hard  to  compare.  They're  not  apples  to   apples,  but  it's  worth  showing  that  if   some  of  this  decentralized  tech  does   catch  on,  they  are  tremendously   undervalued  when  you  look  at  the  private   valuations  for  things  like  Open  AI,   which  are  sitting  near  a  trillion   dollars,  there  is  a  lot  of  room  to  run   for  any  AI  use  case  in  the  crypto  space   that  does  take  off.  And  we  know  that   agents  are  going  to  start  transacting   within  crypto  at  an  accelerated  pace.  So   again,  Tao  and  AI  agents  and  that  whole   narrative  is  front  and  center.  And  it's   worth  noting  that  this  is  going  to  rear   its  head  whenever  crypto  flips  bullish.   The  safest  way  to  look  at  crypto  is  to   just  play  the  momentum  to  focus  on  the   extreme  utility  and  the  fees  being   generated  by  something  like  Hyperlquid   or  to  play  the  AI  agent  game.  As  far  as   the  speculative  bets  for  when  the  market   has  strength,  again,  if  the  market  risks   off,  nothing  is  safe  once  Bitcoin  loses   key  levels.  We're  not  going  to  be   playing  the  opium  game.  We're  going  to   be  playing  the  shorting  game,  which   we'll  talk  about  because  I  was  able  to   make  a  significant  amount  of  money  on   the  actual  collapse  finally  once  we  left   the  housekeeping  zone  of  $96,000.  And   while  I'm  hoping  we  don't  do  that  again,   we  got  to  be  ready  with  a  game  plan  to   make  money  whether  we're  going  up  or   down.  That  is  the  game.  I  hope  you  guys   are  enjoying  this.  I'm  going  to  be   trying  to  bring  you  rapidfire  updates   because  the  market  is  absolutely   cooking.  So,  please  smash  that  like   button.  It's  a  free  and  easy  way  to  show   you  appreciate  all  IO  trades  for   sticking  with  you  on  a  third  bare  market   here.  Of  course,  the  goal  as  always  is   to  aggressively  buy  the  lows  and  to  ride   the  next  bull  cycle  to  Valhalla.  As   always,  if  you  enjoyed  this  one,  smash   that  like  button  and  subscribe.
summary_hu: A videó egy új bullish Bitcoin mintázatra fókuszál, amely 74,000 dollárnál nagyobb árat ért el, és ez az első pozitív hír hónapok óta. A Bitcoin és más kriptovaluták árfolyama gyorsan növekszik, amely arra utal, hogy az alacsony árfolyamokból való kilábalás kezdődhet. A videó említi Michael Sailor új stratégiáját és a Stretch nevű eszközt, amely Bitcoin vásárlásokat finanszíroz. A 70,000-74,000 dolláros zóna gyors mozgásokat is mutatott a múltban, ami fenntartja a bullish hangulatot. A beszélgetésben megjelenik a piaci dinamikák, a háborús események és azok hatása a Bitcoinra, valamint a szokásos piaci kapitalizációs szempontok. Az emelkedés ellenben veszélyeket is hordozhat, mint a közelgő krízisek, amelyek visszahúzhatják az árakat. Összességében egy új bullish szakasz kezdete lehet, de a biztonsági szintek megfigyelése kulcsfontosságú.
summary_en: The video focuses on a new bullish Bitcoin pattern, which has reclaimed the price of $74,000, marking the first positive news in months. Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies are rapidly increasing, suggesting a potential recovery from previous lows. The video discusses Michael Sailor's new strategy and the Stretch tool that funds Bitcoin purchases. Additionally, the $70,000-$74,000 range has shown rapid movements in the past, maintaining a bullish sentiment. Market dynamics, geopolitical events, and their effects on Bitcoin are explored, along with regular market capitalization considerations. The rise carries potential risks, such as impending crises that could pull prices down. Overall, it signals the potential beginning of a new bullish phase, but monitoring support levels is crucial.
key_points_hu: Bitcoin elérte a 74,000 dollárt, ami bullish jelet mutat.
Michael Sailor és a Stretch eszköz új Bitcoin vásárlási stratégiát kínál.
A piaci dinamikák és a geopolitikai hatások figyelmeztetnek a rizikókra.
key_points_en: Bitcoin reached $74,000, signaling a bullish trend.
Michael Sailor and the Stretch tool offer a new strategy for Bitcoin purchases.
Market dynamics and geopolitical impacts highlight potential risks.
